events.chronicle: The mayor was indicted in {year} for #indictment_charge#. Approval ticked up two points; the city respects hustle.
{borough} merchants began honoring #scrip_name# in {year}. The Treasury objected from a distance, in writing, postage due.
The water system got a parent company in {year}. The first bill came with a logo, a mascot, and a late fee.
The {neighborhood} casino opened in {year} on a pier rated for half its weight. The house always wins. The harbor is patient.
events.news: ALL BETS ON, ALL PILINGS QUESTIONABLE

events.chronicle: In {year} the {borough} eviction docket went automated. Four hundred families a week, processed without error or eye contact.
{neighborhood}'s squats got paper in {year} — adverse possession, fast-tracked. Landlords called it theft. Tenants called it Tuesday.
By {year} three distributors decided what {borough} ate and when. The price of eggs became an instrument of policy.
The general strike of {year} held #duration#. The city learned which jobs were essential. So did the people doing them.
Debt went door-to-door in {year}. {borough} repo crews wear body cams for marketing purposes.
The Marathon lost its permit in {year} and ran anyway — at night, unmarshaled, course negotiable. Times improved.
{neighborhood} put its roofs to work in {year}: #rooftop_crop#. The bodegas started stocking local and meaning it.
The {neighborhood} shopkeepers federated in {year}, after the third unanswered robbery. Their flag is a cat. Their dues are not optional.
Kidnap insurance became a {borough} small-business expense in {year}. The premiums were negotiable, which was the tell.
By {year} a car left overnight in {neighborhood} returned to its elements by morning. Recycling rates led the nation.
Two tabloids went to war in {year} over #tabloid_feud#. Circulation doubled. The libel suits were settled in headlines.
events.news: PAPER WAR: READ BOTH, TRUST NEITHER

events.chronicle: The studios discovered {neighborhood}'s ruins in {year}. Locals charge by the hour to stay out of frame, and more to stay in it.
The Council's {year} budget session ended in #brawl_detail#. The public-access feed posted record numbers.
The pension fund admitted the math in {year}. The checks kept coming, #pension_fate#.
{borough} legalized the numbers racket it already had in {year}. The runners got laminated badges and kept their routes.
After the trains stopped, the dollar vans annexed {neighborhood}'s routes in {year}. The schedule is oral tradition. The fare is a mood.

indictment_charge: seventeen counts of being the mayor
selling the same air rights four times
a charity that owned a marina upstate
scrip_name: merchant scrip with the old bridge on it
squat_banner: DEED OR NO DEED, WE'RE HOME
strike_banner: THE CITY RUNS ON OUR BACKS, LET IT WALK
rooftop_crop: tomatoes with a skyline view and a security detail
greens, chickens, and one unsanctioned goat
enough peppers to be worth robbing
chop_graffiti: WE BUY ANYTHING WITH A VIN
LOCK IT OR LOSE IT (YOU'LL LOSE IT)
YOUR CAR IS IN A BETTER PLACE
tabloid_feud: which of them had invented a serial arsonist
brawl_detail: a thrown gavel and two broken livestreams
fists over the parks budget, of all things
an attempted exorcism, ruled out of order
pension_fate: indexed to a number that no longer printed
backed by a parking garage across the river
